user.title: Select Device
user.description: Select a PoolPal device to add a calibrated water level sensor to.

configure.title: Configure Calibration
configure.description: Choose the source entity ending in _value and set a calibration factor. The raw value will be multiplied by the factor to produce a water level in cm.

data_description.source_entity: The entity on this device that provides the raw _value
data_description.calibration_factor: Multiplier applied to the raw value (calibrated = raw × factor)
data_description.name: Friendly name for the calibrated sensor

error.invalid_state: The selected entity does not have a valid numeric state.
error.unknown_device: Selected device was not found in the device registry.

abort.no_devices: No PoolPal devices were found in the Home Assistant device registry.
abort.no_entities: No entities ending in _value were found on the selected device.
